title: SUDOKU
technique: Blue-and-white puzzle geometry builds oversized outlined numerals and a centered wordmark from hard-edged cells.
composition: Symmetric interlocking number forms fill the board while the title sits across the lower center.
quality: Excellent geometric discipline: a limited palette and repeated outline thickness make the abstraction immediately legible.
summary: Geometric title art: symmetric blue-and-white number forms and a centered hard-edged wordmark.
